channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: PYPL merger edition 1 — 75 replies — 160.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
PYPL merger edition 1

Open thread • Replies: 75 • Updated: 2026-03-01 11:00 UTC

OP

Here we go!

Early replies (first 3)

61891698
Do it Ryan.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61900244
>>61900235
OK, THEN SELL

61900286
>>61900156
They can function a couple ways... I learned in my business entities law class but all I remember is a sale of all assets. So ways require shareholder approval, others don't

61900297
cash on hands: 10B

61900941
Not selling!
70.

61901344
Looked into it and the fundamentals look bullish. Solid cash flow, alot of cash on hand. Possible buyout on the horizon and stock has taken a beating. Venmo alone is a huge asset. Just bought a bag.

61901538
>>61901344

61902103
https://x.com/ArarNecmettin/status/2026726277357695290?s=20
120-200$

61902172
I bought this shit at $52 like an idiot. I don't want a merger or a buy out. I want them to get their shit together and expand. They own venmo, the need to capitalize on that and take over the little fish with buyer protection.

61902704
>>61891943
What I am going to own Game Stop stock?!

61903001
VOLUME RECORD

61903514
>>61897932
Stop giving jews money

61904108
I bought the pico bottom but only threw in $1000

61904711
>>61904697
HOLY FUUUUCK
OOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO

61904727
>>61891742
>Ripple Labs will buy PayPal. Screen Cap this.
I don't think so, only because they claimed they didn't have any big acquisitions planned for the rest of the year

61908061
>>61903001
739M SHARE

61909665
no merger.
we are fucked

61909693
>>61909665
the gap will be filled

61909824
>>61904697

61910089
>>61906351
Thanks for playing, baggies.

61910124
>>61909824

61915327
Any news?

61916113
>>61915327
https://www.marketbeat.com/instant-alerts/filing-intech-investment-management-llc-purchases-30734-shares-of-paypal-holdings-inc-pypl-2026-02-28/

61918275
Is this still going to 60$? I went all in at 46 because of this thread.

61919240
>>61918275
I Hope return at price of institutional have buy

item.title: is it a iq thing? — 28 replies — 112.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
is it a iq thing?

Open thread • Replies: 28 • Updated: 2026-03-01 11:26 UTC

OP

Are the poors just poor because of their own decisions?

The Stanford marshmallow experiment proves that delayed gratification is the only real wealth filter. If you can’t wait for the second marshmallow as a child, you’re biologically programmed to be a wagie for life. Most people are just dopamine addicts with zero low time preference who treat every paycheck like a hot potato.

Do you know anyone who is broke solely because of their own room-temp IQ financial choices?

Early replies (first 3)

61917974
Some people really ain't got what it takes to save and invest anon. People living by the paycheck and spending it all every month aren't meant to make it

61917983
lmao the people that don't save money when they can are less than 5% of the population, the rest just has a family or other problems. stop comparing yourself with the bottom of the barrel to feel better

unironically, this is why jews are at the top of the food chain

61917985
I agree with the notion and conclusion of this experiment. However it must also be noted that behavior can be learned.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61917999
>>61916430
Inability to delay gratification is also correlated with criminal activity and obesity. It's really fundamental to success in several dimensions.

61918016
>>61916430
Coming from a third world shithole, I see two reasons for this self-destructive behaviour:
>over 70% of the population doesn't earn enough to live comfortably, and genuinely carries on without anything to look forward to so they'd rather waste their money like there's no tomorrow
>they think politics will solve all of their problems

61918021
every poor person has a reason for being being
examples...
>having money will make me a bad person
>I need to be poor because I deserve to be
etc.

61918029
I might get banned for this, but I speak the truth. Average IQ and literacy levels go down down with heritage/race.
down.Now why would the eu import people that only cost money?

61918032
>>61918016
I was victim of the first mentality for a long time. I would spend all my money ordering food, weed and online groceries... I could've been sitting on a nice nest egg but instead I have barely 20k in savings now at the age of 30

61918039
A lot of it is just luck. Some of the richest people I met were dumbasses. Like complete morons.

61918073
>>61916430
The answer is yes.

61918629
>>61916430
I'm hellishly poor because I was born in the third world. Despite owning two houses, a flat, half an acre of land, and a warehouse, I still make and own less than an american mcdonalds manager. Where could I have delayed gratification'd myself into being actually wealthy?

61918645
>>61916430
wagies are niggers.

61918755
>>61916430
20 years ago you might have had a leg to stand on but since the 2008 crash the western economy is held together by duct tape and Talmudic/satanic chants and our currencies are funny money that effectively love double-digit percentages of their own value every year.
These days you need a salary equivalent to six figures in USD to be able to save substantive money while not living a totally shit quality of life. Under these conditions, what >>61918016 says
>over 70% of the population doesn't earn enough to live comfortably, and genuinely carries on without anything to look forward to so they'd rather waste their money like there's no tomorrow
Is a rational choice
>>61918039
Also this. I can't tell you how many millionaires I've met that are just lucky their dads ran a small business they inherited at the same time demand for blue collar work skyrocketed. These bud lite guys definitely could not have made it if they were born to regular working class wagies and had to struggle their way up.

61918821
>>61916430
>poor because of their own decisions?
Black guy here. The answer is Yes. Why? you have to realize that people born into poverty have less security, a basic need that conditions us for future behaviors. Because they have less security and don't know where the next dollar is coming from, they have to become masters of the short-term to survive. This trauma-like short-term mentality then makes them eat the Stanford Marshmallow really fucking fast. And so the cycle of poverty continues.

(pic related is definitely not us)

61918937
>>61918821
I'm from 3 child upper middleclass family.
We have basic needs covered by government (nordic). -No need to eat fast as "big brother" gives more.

Sister(oldest) loaned money for "fun" and made kids as unemployed. Married tough and I'm happy her kids have family. Networth > -$200000 owns nothing.

Brother(middle) has always worked. Has almost nothing saved. Has always lived "in the moment". Networth $10000-30000

Me literally tested for higer IQ than 98% of tested group of higer edugated people.
Better than 70% of population almost on everything and over 90% in some(wealth, income, edugation etc.) networth over 200k I don't know real number right now.

I have paid for my sisters living when I was younger and tought they would pay me back. This is part of the reason I'm doing so "bad" as portion of my wealt was eaten by lazy bums in early days.
Bro needs help from time to time, but pays back.

Same background. No real help early on as parent seperated and wealt got fucked.(Sister got all of the help and me and my brother not so much) We will inherit something tought.
Totally different outcomes and most likely reason IQ.

61919021
>>61916430
you know, I just realized the reason black people don't go in the pool when there's a pool party: ancestral memories of crocodiles, hippos, and pic related

61919057
>>61918629
That's the thing. It's all luck.
Everyone here likes to suck their own dick about their average IQ, but the reality is that anyone could have been born to drug addict parents or get fucked by a medical condition or whatever it may be, and then it doesn't matter. This gay world is all based on RNG so might as well gamble on shitcoins.

61919099
>>61919021
Africa has some strange energy that causes it's creatures to be just wild and gnarly. Same with South America

61919112
>>61916430
They later found that kids from lower socioeconomic backgrounds were more likely to eat the marshmellow immediately, because in their life it was more common to be promised something and then not get it. ie.from their perspective it made more sense to get it while it was there.

61919117
>>61918821
'Born into poverty' is confounding with IQ. Which is genetical. There's no trauma, there's just IQ.

61919118
>>61919112
Low socioeconomic status is confounding with IQ.

61919122
>>61916430
how does the (((stanford))) marshmellow experiment account for jane street stealing all my money?

61919123
>>61919057
I had druggies as parents. That were still on a global scale top 5% financially, even though it was a poor upbringing. That didn't stop me from living my own life. People who blame external factors for their failures are ultimately the biggest losers imaginable. There is no situation that's too bad to get out of. Only losers who don't and those who do. The losers cry faul play and suck dick in alleyways their whole lives.

61919125
>>61919122
No crying in the casino.

61919128
>>61919125
stfu, crack-baby

61919154
>>61916430
>Do you know anyone who is broke solely because of their own room-temp IQ financial choices?
That's literally every person i know. Most my friends irl earn much, much more money than i do, and they somehow always broke af.
Then they tell me their latest stories and it's facepalm inducing every single time.

Latest anecdote, a friend of mine, second wedding after a divorce (where he got financially raped obviously), found himself a qt nearly a decade younger. But she knows what she want. And for her honeymoon she wanted a trip in the caribbeans, private resort and all the jazz.
For the flight he doesn't get exchangeable tickets. But like retards they show up to the wrong airport for the departure (they mixed up the round-trip bcuz the return ticket was at the other Paris airport). Don't commute in time, boom, 1500€ down the drain for x2 departure ticket.

In urgency he book the next flight availible to the same destination. Last minute prices, where companies rape you the hardest, ends up costing 35% more. He takes it, but it's only 16 hours later. But everything was booked and ready in the caribbeans, so he had to pay up for the driver, the guide, the pilot who were supposed to commute them from the inter airport down to the small island they got their reservations on. Forced to pay last minute hotel rooms for 3 next to the airport (where it's the most expensive), keep the cessna reserved for a full day at the aerodrome, foot their restaurant bills, etc... Boom boom.
1/2

61919156
>>61919154
2/2
They finally arrive there, it's a little paradise, everything is comfy, good honeymoon spent relaxing, diving, drinking at the beach and fucking the young bride. Everything is perfect. Then it's return time. Back to the airport, drama with the company because they changed the route due to exceptional circumstances. Basically there will now be a stopover in Colombia : 20 hours in transit. Company propose to partially refund the ticket, but problem, my friend was on a tight schedule and had an important meeting he couldn't miss the day later. He had to find a last minute ticket via local flight to Costa Rica who would then direct flight back to Paris. On first class. The wife didn't feel like waiting alone in a colombian airport, so 2nd ticket. Boom, 3K€ down the drain.
In the end, he budgeted his honeymoon to cost about 10K€. Ended up costing him an extra 7K€ just for travel shenanigans. That's how my friends are all broke all the time. Because they do dumb shit with their cash all the time. Fucking holed buckets.

61919294
>>61916430
Yes, but it's not only about IQ. It's also about being able to fit in a mold. Being able to conform. Normies will waste years of their lives in college and accept the idea of working their asses off their whole life in exchange of a good retirement. To them is a completely acceptable deal. To me, that's complete madness. The only reason I still have a jo is because the alternative is leeching off my parents.

61919299
>>61916430
one major reason but not the single one is they never learned delayed gratification. they are basically poor because of failed parenting. you dont need to be smart to make money.

item.title: AAAAAAAAAAAAAHHH CLARITY ACT??? — 16 replies — 64.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
AAAAAAAAAAAAAHHH CLARITY ACT???

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-03-01 11:16 UTC

OP

MORE LIKE CLARITY FUCK!!!
WHAT THE FUUUUUUUUUUUUCK??????

Early replies (first 3)

61917377
>>61914810
I hope it passes soon nerd. Seems like it could be bullish desu.

61917417
Clarity act? the only thing clear for me right now is my constant fucking diarrhea from the stress of waiting for these cocksuckers to pass this steaming pile of bullshit

61917477
In the end, it is sad that it again depends on the sakes of some government. The whole idea was to do away with that control. But now, I admit, there is no other way. Buy value.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61917688
>>61917417
i miss these times

61917881
>>61914810
I'D RATHER STICK A CACTUS UP MY DICKHOLE THAN FOLLOW THIS LAW

61917897
>>61914810
What a shitload of fuck!

61917901
I didn't write the post I share, but you were warned.

61917918
>>61917901
you did though

61917944
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k-tunRwGPIQ

61917954
Will the clarity act even do anything?

61917963
>>61917954
It wil change the way humanity functions the same way the iPhone did.

61917981
>>61914810
>>61917377
>>61917417
>>61917688
Based uncs. How's your 30s going?

61917989
>>61917901
Gold silver and oil are also examples of artificial scarcity. Do you genuinely think that off the book reserves only apply towards diamonds? The only tangible commodity you can relatively say is scarce without artificial scarcity is corn. Corn is the commodity of commodities, it fuels civilization. It cannot be replicated, all cloned derivatives are apparent on sight. Corn is quite possibly how im going to ride out the financial turmoil, im all in on corn(ticker MAIZE). Corn syrup, popcorn, corn powered fuel for vehicles, cornpop, cream corn, kettle corn, corn on the cob, corn on rye, corn generated energy.


You fools are playing with Mickey Mouse tokens and Scrooge McDuck bars, im plotting on a cornup

61918776
>>61917981
Im 47

61919004
>>61917981
Im in my mid 20s avgn was my childhood

61919275
Isn’t there a connection between clarity act and war with iran?

item.title: DOT price targets for this cycle? — 13 replies — 29.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
DOT price targets for this cycle?

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-03-01 11:02 UTC

OP

DOT price targets for this cycle?

Early replies (first 3)

61916592
>>61916585
>WWE

These are your fellow investors.

61916663
$5 best case scenario

61916705
0

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61917099
>>61916663

I see 80 dollars

61917603
>>61916585
100.69$

61917609
>>61916585
Also consider using; https://app.interlay.io/lending or https://app.bifrost.io/farming?network=polkadot or https://app.hydration.net/strategies. You'll get more while also supporting the network with your activity. It's a double W

61917613
>>61916585
>this cycle
We are in a bear market. Below $1.

61917631
>>61916585
>>61917609
Another W is that you can INSTANTLY take your DOT back, whereas if you use an exchange to stake you're forced to wait the 28D (soon the dynamic unbonding will get implemented, but still. What is better? Instant unstaking or having to wait for a few days and not get any money while you wait?)

61917636
>>61916585

How do I stake

61917640
>>61917636
Read here >>61917609
Or you can also use; https://staking.polkadot.cloud/#/overview BUT you'll get less while also being subject to the unstaking queue... I don't recommend this method, BUT it's still better to use staking.polkadot.cloud than any of the CEXs

61917693
>>61916663
>5000% apy for staking
>$5 earned eoy
Seems very legit, my friend

61917701
>>61917693
HEEEELLLL YEAAAA BROOOOTHEEEERRRR WOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO

Halving in 13 days https://polkadothalving.com/. The APY os going down to 5.6%. The inflation will be around 2.95624% because of that, because not all of DOT is staked. 52.79% is staked, therefore inflation = 0.5279 * 5.6% = 2.95624%. Here https://staking.polkadot.cloud/#/overview you can CTRL+F "Supply staked".

61919244
75 or 37

item.title: I swear none of you Niggers get the memo — 6 replies — 24.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
I swear none of you Niggers get the memo

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-03-01 11:26 UTC

OP

you think you are smart snickering and bickering about the capabilities of AI, making fun of the sums given to Jewman and all that clueless shit.

Let me school you Niggers.

the reason why Jewman gets trillions of funding is NOT some revolutionary hyped up potential of AI. the reason is that nobody googles anymore. I dont know if you can get this into your tiny knuckle heads but he literally replaced Google.
plus he introduced the service with a limited free use token system from the start and if you want to do more searching, play up. it's paid google search if you will. PLUS he will put ads on that bitch.

the monetization of AI chatbots is the monetization of Google squared and everybody wants in on that. it is a once in two decades chance to participate in financial growth not seen since Google appeared on the radar.

so when Jewman asks for a trilly, motherfuckers say "Yes, Mr. Altman."

GOD sometimes I want to slap you clueless faggots.

Early replies (first 3)

61919235
>>61919209
Nigger, please.
Who is going to pay for a search engine that hallucinates results so you have to double check? Fagman introduced ads already and soon will add porn, I'm sure its because the current monetization model is so great and profitable

61919247
>>61919235
alright man how many years ago did you screencap this? kek

61919251
>>61919235
gotta say though that is funny as fuck kek

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61919291
>>61919209
>he literally replaced Google.
only because google enshitified itself into uselessness.

61919293
>>61919209
AI is extremely useful
At the same time US equities are at extreme bubble territory, with the pop starting sometime in the next few months leading to a lost decade in stocks

61919297
>>61919291
perfect storm

can't some people just handle the annoyance that some undeserving brat made a fortune with some gay ass internet tokens?

61919260
>>61919236
Bitcoin will survive, 99% of shitcoins will end up going to their 2018 ATLs and never recover. Hope you're not holding shitcoins (altcoins)

61919285
>>61919236
At one point they are going to be right and you are wrong. They have to be right only once for you to get fully wiped out.

item.title: WOAH What year is it where am I? /biz/?? when did they add an iz? — 73 replies — 21.7/hr

Open thread • Replies: 73 • Updated: 2026-03-01 08:07 UTC

OP

WOAH
What year is it where am I?
/biz/?? when did they add an iz?

Early replies (first 3)

61906377
>>61906370
Whatever..
Finance?
Ummm okay
Ill brought you a gift /b/iz/?

61906378
>>61906370
Thats epic wing guy. Idk why its called that, but he's pretty epic.

61906379
>>61906377
Well would you look at that dubs
were off to a great start

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61908230
SHUT IT DOWN

61908300
>>61907109
fuck off cringe attention whore

61908624
Good thread.

61909145
>>61908624
best thread on /biz/ rn

61909183
>jpg
Fake oldfags, all of you

61909185
>>61906370
We now have AI that is smarter than 99% of humans.

61909212
>>61907301
New anxiety unlocked

61909219
>>61906449

61909264
>>61906449

61909521
Bretty good thread

61909548
More like this. Based.

61909664
>>61906370
What memecoin is this?

61910663
Postan in an oldfag bread

61912801
Best thread rn

61914222
>>61906370

>>61906370

>not gif
>not 400x400

Regardless, I appreciate the thread and the effort. Weirdly, I was thinking of EFG just the other day.

61914231
best content on the 4chinz for years

61914300
I have been using 4chan since 2008 basically every day

61915467
>>61914222

Wasnt his name Optimized Gif Dude

It was low bandwidth versions of popular memes.

61915797
>>61914300
Same but make it 2004 and few months of break once in a while

61917312
>>61906458
>>61907301
I would really love to go back to post dial up but pre smartphone internet world and just stay there, basically everything past that point has been a downgrade and the few things that have improved aren't worth it at all

61917331
The saddest thing is that as you age and age you realize that the new gens will say the same thing. Their real quality is what they know too.

61917585
>incorrect file names
Salvia officinalis in fields

61917849
>>61906370
>jpg

61918416
great thread. i miss /b/.

61918426
This was not spam.

61918486
>>61909212
Anxiety? What? There’s nothing scary about that photo

61918948
>>61906370
Good thread. It's been a while since OP wasn't a faggot

61918968
>>61918416

It’s a cesspit now. Dont even look. Man I’m 46! Where did the time go.

item.title: ISREAL BOMBS IRAN — 88 replies — 17.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
ISREAL BOMBS IRAN

Open thread • Replies: 88 • Updated: 2026-03-01 06:27 UTC

OP

EVERYTHING DUMPING

WWIII

How fucked are we?

Early replies (first 3)

61915005
>>61914991
Nothing burger

61915010
>>61914991
i have a certified iq of 143 and i'm telling you the markets will open higher on monday

61915015
>>61914991
It will be over before monday

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61916148
>>61916079
see >>61916118 this guy's post as well, rabbi. iranians aren't 50 IQ sand niggers.

61916155
So is this time the real deal? Not like last year when it was just some tactical bombings?

61916159
Do people not realize that Iran mines a fuck ton of crypto which means they will have to start a fuck ton to fund this war?

61916176
>>61916118
You have no clue what you're talking about. The leadership is a bunch of Arabs thats killing Persians aka real Iranians.

61916178
>>61916176
>Persians
I fucking hate Iranians who still call themselves that

61916201
>>61915858
>>61916079
Lol what is this 60 year old guy typing dawg that aint it

61916203
Republicans starting wars, again

61916208
I unironically have TDS; this orange baboon drives me fucking crazy. Get me out of this timeline.

61916211
Iran is now bombing crypto influencers in Dubai lmao

61916240
>>61916211
the fuck? source or didn't happen

61916251
I will be honest, I hope a lot of burgers will die for Israel. You burgers deserve much more for subversion you suffered and did nothing about it. Now your military is completely controlled by the tribe and your carriers and planes are doing what Bibi tells them to do. Embarrassing.

61916254
>>61916240
Just look up Iran missile Dubai

61916479
Geopolitical bros, what are your thoughts about this? Do you think this will end up like what happened a year ago or this is the real deal?

I wouldn't like to see a v shape recovery.

Pls, I don't wanna have to go to /pol/ and talk to those people.

61916505
>>61916479
Unpopular opinion: Nothing ever happens.
The US does not have the industry capacity for a war with Iran.

61916522
>>61915128
He’s ending the war, not starting it, dipshit.

61916526
>>61916251
What do you think will happen, fag, when there is no one left to fight in the Middle East?

Cannibalize the master...

61916528
>>61916522
We’ve always been at war with Eurasia, etc etc.

61916704
>>61915888
For me it’s Metallica Mob

61916728
>>61916211
A selfless and victimless act.
My heartfelt commiseration goes to Iran.

61916733
>>61916479
Iran's regime cucked itself into a corner. It's being attacked by Israel and it's golem, all the while its populace hates the regime and want to overthrow it. It's literally ogre for the regime. All they can do now is go out with a bang and try to cause as much destruction as possible. The regime leadership should've fled to Russia when they had the chance.

61916849
Do you guys think the mexican peso will be affected much if at all by this?
I was shorting EURMXN friday. i think i might be earning a ton when the market opens

61918083
>>61915858
>the baby-slurpers believe in some kind of color-blind utopia

61918090
>>61915027

61918142
>>61916733
who the fuck would care what an average normgroid in some country thinks
its 2026, if you can't manufacture consent, you have no business ruling anyone

61918181
>>61914991
Biggest nothingburger of this year already

61918233
>>61915655
>Muslims are a bigger threat than Jews
Said no non-jew ever. At least try to blend in if you're going to make gey propaganda.

61918353
>>61918181
yep. the US could literally nuke several countries at once and there would be no consequences whatsoever, just some stupid drama for a few days. this is the uncomfortable truth the rest of the world doesn't like to hear.

61918560
>>61915033
165 here and I don't even care. May as well let them kill each other half way across the planet.

61918785
I unironically think we need more war so that markets stop overreacting to it. Just let my ETFs steadily go up in peace.

item.title: Rolling thread. I got 15k in BTC. 5k in XRP. 7k in BNB. 4K in DOGE. and 3k in PEPE. (Cuz the short time movement makes m… — 29 replies — 10.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Rolling thread. I got 15k in BTC. 5k in XRP. 7k in BNB. 4K in DOGE. and 3k in PEPE. (Cuz the short time movement makes m…

Open thread • Replies: 29 • Updated: 2026-03-01 08:34 UTC

OP

Rolling thread.
I got 15k in BTC.
5k in XRP.
7k in BNB.
4K in DOGE.
and
3k in PEPE. (Cuz the short time movement makes my pepe go hard)
Dubs decide what I drop my 1k gambling money* on.
*Coin must be on Binance and the numbers given are in my local currency.

Early replies (first 3)

61914191
chainlink

61914195
>>61914184
Long XAGUSDT perp futures contracts. 50x leverage.

61914201
>>61914191
Thank god you failed. I dont want to be honor bound to lose money.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61914208
>>61914195
Sorry mate. I am to retarded to do longs and or shorts. Should have put that in the OP. My bad.

61914523
>>61914184
Another 1k into XRP.
alternatively, Eth or Solana.

61914529
>>61914184

duinocoin

61914533
bingus token

61914563
>>61914533
We have a winner. Stand by.

61914582
>>61914533
Im sorry friend, but I cant find a coin named BINGUS on Binance spot trade. Therefore I am forced to call your dubs null and void. Unless I am simply to stupid to see it.

61914601
just buy @epsteinbitcoin or @jeevacation12 username on fragment and resell for profit noob

61914609
>>61914523
I would like to add a bit to my XRP investment, but that is too long term to make this fun. So I am glad you didnt score the dubs, if you will excuse me flippant-cye.

61914612
Can you donate some money to me? I'm in massive debt... I'll make an interesting video in return!

61914617
>>61914601
I tried to invest in COCKSUCKER token but I didnt want to compete with a major whale like yourself.

61914621
>>61914612
The Check is in the mail.

61914623
>>61914621
Please... I really am in a tough spot, if genuine help is possible please contact me at: sketchycornerofficial@gmail.com

61914642
>>61914623
You got mail.

61914708
>>61914642
I didn't...

61914722
>>61914708
Check the business folder.

61914739
what a homosexual thread

61914749
Dump it all on VVV, the private ai token biz missed 5x in 3 months

61914766
>>61914739
At least its not botosexual.

61914783
rolling for luck

61914821
>>61914783As far as I know there is no such coin. But lucky you did not score a *get* so I am spared trying to find one.

61914830
>>61914201
Retards like you are going to rope. 35k is barely enough as it is for 1 coin. And you have it spread out in an equal pie chart between 5 coins that have already mooned. So even if you get a 50x out of one of them (which won’t happen) you’ll still be below anons here currently in low 6 figure hell that want to kill themselves right now.

If you put that all into Link you’ll have a comfy 3k stack and will actually make it. Remember, Link hasn’t mooned. Most of the year and a half that it went from $1 to $50 it steadily rose. By the time it got to the top 5 the entire crypto community was like huh? It hasn’t even left the launch pad yet. It just slowly went up the ladder to get to the launch pad and then just been ranging down with most other shit since until it gigmoons.

61914846
>>61914830
Give me a pic related of Link, well and good zoomed out.

61915450
>>61914846
You are going to kys. Imagine having barely enough for 1 coin, having zero chance of making it with it being diversified, while actually being on a Link board where everyone knows, and still not sticking it all in link and getting 3k which will very likely be a mega stack to everyone in the world outside this board by 2030. It would be one thing if you like only kinda knew about link in passing and weren’t able to decipher that it will be the one. But you are actually on the cutting edge board for link and aren’t invested. Fucking doge? 1/4th of a BTC? You are going to be so fucked. At least put half of all that garbage you have into Link and get 1,500 coins. Fucking retard.

61915490
>>61915450
>Hoes mad

61915624
zerpee

61919007
XRP

item.title: Anyone else getting the itch? — 54 replies — 6.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Anyone else getting the itch?

Open thread • Replies: 54 • Updated: 2026-03-01 02:32 UTC

OP

The big boys'll go back up, that's guaranteed money. But some others will 10x, 100x, 1000x. I'm feelin' like it's SHIB's turn.

Early replies (first 3)

61900851
>>61899833
Checked

61900872
>>61899833
I'll just keep buying small amounts of it for the rest of my life, and see what happens.

61900948
>>61899833
i believe in shib

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61906744
>>61901257
>>61901298
>>61901324
>>61901689
>>61904495

2 trilly stack holder here. I'm so tired bros. I've been hodling Toad for years at this point. I'm one of shibs faithful, always.

Wen moon?

61907601
>>61906744
Idk but things appear to be happenin
>toadkiller.io

61907613
>12 trilly retard chad

61907840
>>61907613
Average cost?

61907871
>>61907840
Idk never calculated. Doesn’t really matter in my mind desu

61908029
Crypto could be a thing again if AI fucks off. We'll see

61908071
>>61907601
Has anyone joined the Telegram? I don't have it but I'd like to know the scoop on what going on in theire.

61908088
>>61908071
>bunch of paid shills
>twitter raids
>no active OG’s except Leon

61908099
>>61908088
Bearish...

61908121
shib

61908132
>>61908099
How so? Someone must be paying these shills to make it appear organic no?

61911287
>>61899833
I’m itchy in my butthole

61911290
>>61907613
>>61907601
>>61906744
>>61905725
SCAM only incel chuds would ever fall for something called TOAD

61912257
>>61911290

>You just know.
Toad is a scam, kek.

https://www.youtube.com/shorts/kbjE_QXY7n8

61912602
>>61912257
Toad is road

61912644
Come on SHIB let's moon!

61912668
Toad

61912724
>>61912644
Checked and
>You just know
Shibs on sale again!

61912911
this thread smells like india
>YES SAAAR BUY TOAD SAAR IT IS NEW DOGE SAAR

61912963
>>61912911
It’s the next shib not doge, retard

61912969
I boughted more Shib today. It ain't easy being a good boy in these doggy-dog times.

61913401
>>61912969
I never thought it would be this low again. I shlopped another 50m today too.

61913435
>>61913401
Could’ve got close to 1T toad for that price

61915673
>>61912963
Man... can you imagine the seethe on this board if this turns out to be true.

61917994
>>61913435
I made that pic kek

61917997
I had to sell all my toad though

61918166
>>61917997
What if it does what it’s intended to do and you sold? I’m not sure I could live with myself. I’d definitely rather lose the money than live with that type of fuckup for the rest of my life

61918170
Don't make last cycles mistake anon
Stay away from memecoins and bitcoin, 100% in ETH or XMR

item.title: THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ IS CLOSED - REUTERS — 32 replies — 6.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ IS CLOSED - REUTERS

Open thread • Replies: 32 • Updated: 2026-03-01 06:06 UTC

OP

The strait of hormuz handles 20% of all oil exports on the planet

Early replies (first 3)

61916540
>>61916533
Nice way to piss off your Arab neighbors

61916541
>>61916533
Well if they close the straight of Hormuz, america and Israel will attack them and invade them.

61916546
>>61916540
America will bomb them if they close it

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61916552
>>61916533
Closed with what, ayatollah?

61916573
Does iran even exist.

61916574
>>61916540
And the majority of the world

61916575
>>61916552
You don't need a navy or an air force to make it highly impassable

61916582
>>61916533
Uncle Jeff says now you're supposed to short shipping future.

61916587
>>61916533
more like the gay of homos

61916591
>>61916533
OPERATION EPSTEIN FURY IS UNDERWAY

61916595
>>61916575
There are drones with 10 gigapixel cameras in the air and 50 planes ready to drop bombs the second AI detects suspicious activity.

61916608
>>61916533
Nice.
Oil calls will pump now!

61916616
bullish for bitcoin

61916645
>>61916616
wrong

61916649
>>61916645
check the chart

61916658
>>61916533
>THE HECKING STRAIT OF HORMUZ

61916662
>>61916541
>Well if they close the straight of Hormuz, america and Israel will attack them and invade them.
Zogbots have already been doing that since 1979.

Israle and zogbot burgers deserve to get nuked they've been asking for it for a long time.

Is you're brain isnt independent enough to recognize this, you're just another zogbot zombie

61916666
>>61916649
ok done
yup still down 50% from the top
crypto bear market still has 7+ months to go, better get comfy

61916760
>>61916552
ever heard of submarine mines?

61917209
>muh bitcoin
fucking piece of shit retards
tankers you fucking cucks
TRMD
hafnia
scorpio
already pumping for weeks

I almost hate to throw this to you because you're so fucking stupid and retarded but im already loaded up low

61917773
>>61916533

61917788
>>61916662
Latinos, Blacks and asians are conquering them so don't worry the US empire is death unless Trump saves it after the elections

61917794
>>61917788
Ha! Drumpf isn't saving Jack shit.
He only works for zog, the mic, his own ego, and Goldman sachs
Trump doesn't give one single fuck about actual Americans

61917858
>>61916540
They just bombed them.
One might argue the pissed off levels can't increase much.

61918415
>>61917773
kek

61918452
it's some dude trolling on the radio

61918498
>>61916533
Doesn't affect me because I don't go there anyway.

61918549
>>61916533
Time to long oil?

61918556
>>61916541
>being this bluepilled.
Okay so here's the redpill. Nobody will ever invade Iran. Ever. It's too mountainous, and everybody knows that they would have their asses handed to them if they were stupid enough to put troops on the ground there. You thought Vietnam was bad? Picture that times like 100. No goverment will ever admit this, but all you have to do is look at a topographical map of Iran. It makes Switzerland look like Kansas lol.
>inb4 muh drone warfare
We've had that tech for decades. If they thought it would actually be effective, then they would've used it by now. It's all theater so trump can appease the trailer trash that still supports him.

61918567
Uh, Iran can t do shit, they dont even have a navy. Their missiles can barely hit a building.

61918573
>>61916552
underrated post

61918750
>>61917794
I supported trump for 8 years before I realised how true this is. Happy to admit I was wrong

item.title: So Tradingview is over $400 US a month if you want to see 1 min charts? — 18 replies — 5.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
So Tradingview is over $400 US a month if you want to see 1 min charts?

Open thread • Replies: 18 • Updated: 2026-03-01 08:27 UTC

OP

So Tradingview is over $400 US a month if you want to see 1 min charts? I was told I need Ultimate, where can you see and trade 1 min charts for free or cheaper than that?

Early replies (first 3)

61918479
$461 worth of product but they are willing to give it to you for free for 1 month, thats a $461 giveaway.

61918533
>>61918479
Even free tradingview has minute charts, you have to go up to premium if you want seconds based intervals. I don't know where your getting that price from. I'm showing $240 for ultimate if you go with the most expensive billed monthly option. But if you seriously want tradingview, get whatever minimum plan you can stand until black friday, that's when they have their once a year huge sale on annual plans.

61918574
>>61918474
Trading view sucks so much it's unreal. No wonder topstep made their own trading platform.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61918578
>>61918474
imagine paying $400 a month to see 1m charts when you could just $400 long

61918579
>trading 1 min charts

utterly pointless lol

61918641
>>61918474
>>61918479
>>61918533
>>61918574
>>61918578
>Paying for something that is free

do retards really lmao

anything below 4hours is for retards anyway

61918644
>>61918474
>15 watchlist alerts
>ability to BUY professional market data

61918648
>>61918579
>>61918641
You stupid faggots realize that a lot of people make hundreds of thousands or millions of dollars a year trading nothing but 1 - 5 minute charts right?

61918660
>>61918648
no they dont

61918681
>>61918648
proof?

61918744
>>61918660
>>61918681
Lmao, sheltered retards... why are you on /biz? Fabio Valentini is considered one of the current best traders in the world and trades strictly on one and five minute charts. He is one among thousands... you guys are so fucking clueless it's embarrassing. Don't talk about trading ever again.

61918761
>>61918744
>saaar please pay $500 for trading view saaar need more indicators and 1 minute chart to be good trader

kek you fool

61918799
>>61918761
I get 1 minute amd any timeframe charts for free on my trading platform, don't need or use trading view nor do I give any fucks if somebody pays them or not. Did you want to address how wrong and uninformed you are about scalping and traders who make more in a year than you will in your entire life on one minute time frames or shift goal posts even further?

61918807
>>61918648
and how many don't?

61918845
>>61918474
Tradingjew kek

61918847
>>61918641
Pay up tards!

61918850
>>61918744
I have seen many cex and another jew corpo shill on biz, but tv kek, we have reached rock bottom, iq wise.

61918997
>>61918474
Binance?

item.title: $120,000 a year is $10,000 a month. That is ALOT of money. — 51 replies — 5.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
$120,000 a year is $10,000 a month. That is ALOT of money.

Open thread • Replies: 51 • Updated: 2026-03-01 02:53 UTC

OP

$120,000 a year is $10,000 a month. That is ALOT of money.

Early replies (first 3)

61910225
Let me guess, there is 4 people with this job

61910236
>>61910225
I dont get it

61910240
>>61910170
Get a clearance and work for one of the intelligence agencies NGA or NGIS and make way more.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61914025
>>61910263
>if you don't get sick then you can't really touch it.
You can use that shit on anything. I'm wearing a pair of prescription glasses that cost around $5k that I paid for with my HSA, half of that being an employer match. You can use it to buy exercise equipment, red light panels, whatever. Basically if you ever buy anything tangentially related to health, you can pay for it with your HSA.

61914045
>>61910170
I make 120k a year.
Right off the bat, I take home maybe half of it.
Do I need to keep talking? This country is a scam.

61914081
>>61910170
It used to be. Not any more.

61914098
>>61914045
Yeah, for some reason this is considered rich when it is the buying power of a butcher in the 70s. And it’s taxed like it’s rich

61914137
>>61914098
Median income in the U.S. is around $80k a year.

61914164
>>61914137
Why do people use the median as some kind of argument? The median is a lesser quantity of life than your parents median and people should be more upset over it.

61914188
i.e. the median nominal wage is relative. Real wages are dogshit. It’s a good divide and conquer strategy to get folks fighting about the “outlier” that is a mere 30k more taxed at a higher bracket

61915225
>>61910170
170k/yr here, after tax it's about $120k/yr

61916482
>>61914164
I’m doing better than my parents in every capacity at $80k beyond the inability to buy a home. And even then, I really don’t give a shit about it beyond the prospect of building more wealth.

61916504
>>61910263
There's always something you can spend it on, and most of them let you invest in stocks or something in. Even better if your employer is the one contributing to it. HSA is free money for smart people.

61916518
>>61916482
Impressive level of cattle cope.

61916554
>>61915225
250k/yr here, after tax it's about $150k/yr

61916594
>>61910170
Unironically my w2 pay is $180k and my take home after taxes and everything is $10k. My 1099 income is taxed at like 40%.
Without taxes I make around $250k/yr, after taxes and insurance I make around $160k. I lose about $100k a year to the spic nig cycle

61916698
>>61916482
>beyond the inability to buy a home.
so you're actually doing far worse than your parents. what do you think is going to happen when you try to retire? rents are $1.5k+ for a 1 bedroom in most of the USA. social security is barely $1.5k a month for most people. i hope you're putting a LOT of money into retirement investments.

61916724
>>61914045
I really wish we had the ability to opt out of social security and just got that money tax free.

61916831
>>61916724
kek
Social only works when everyone who does function is forced to pay for 4 other people too. If you can opt out, most would, leaving only the ones who can't pay in the pool. It wouldn't work.
The only thing you can do is go places where it's different.

61916983
>>61910170
I make that in almost two weeks

61917050
>>61910170

61917056
>>61917050

61917061
>>61917056
I’d say an ALOT stack of money is roughly 600k USD, not 100k. OP wrong as usual.

61917100
>>61914025
so you blew $5K on fucking glasses and think that is a flex, kek.

61917113
>>61917050
It doesn't look like a cross

61917241
>>61910263
After a certain age you can withdraw your HSA without penalties like a 401k

61917247
>>61910225
i mean why the fuck do you need more than 4. i'm pretty sure most people are familiar with how the ground works lmao

61917269
>>61917050
>>61917056
Honestly I use alot simply because it bothers people. At this point it's common use and should just be accepted as a word anyways.

61917275
>>61916594
I'm not a tax attorney, but I'm thinking you should be structured as an llc, where the llc receives the 1099, you take as small of a salary as you can get a way with, and then more tax favorable distributions later.

61918122
>>61916518
This doesn’t mean anything to me.
>>61916698
I make $80k and max my traditional 401(k), HSA, Roth IRA, and do another 10 percent to a backdoor Roth. This all goes to VOO. Including employer match, I’m near $50k a year being saved. I consider myself very fortunate.

61918131
>>61913990
>>61913412
Specifically, move to Maryland and start checking USjobs.gov for open positions, and be on the lookout for job fairs and networking events.

61918185
>>61918131
I have schizophrenia and sit at home all day, and don't even think I could work a normal job again, im more looking for a role similiar to the tv The Mentalist, where I come in, figure out the problem the leave. will that affect my prospects?

61918232
>>61917100
He spent $3k on $5k-quality glasses because Uncle Sam chipped in $2k.

item.title: Its LINK season — 77 replies — 4.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Its LINK season

Open thread • Replies: 77 • Updated: 2026-02-28 19:07 UTC

OP

Act accordingly

Early replies (first 3)

61900759
>>61900750
did the March larp was true?????

61900762
This pump won't fail like all the others.

61900776
pump's already failed, stinkie

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61904485
I need ro sell my stinkies, please provide exit liquidity

61904534
piece of shit can't even sustain a minor 15% pump
I'm never getting out of this shitcoin, FUCK

61904571
>>61904534

61904855
>>61904534

61904970
>>61904468
>>61904855
perma BAN the cuckolds from /biz/

61905034
>>61903396
So you're saying the dump is yet to come?

61905049
Buy up my LINK marines! Slurp up as much as you can! You will NEVER be able to buy LINK for under $10 after this
I already bought another bag and I am feeling cool like a diamond hands

61906253
>>61905034
no this is what happened during that relentless dump in late jan, early feb
jane street was convicted of market manipulation and exited crypto entirely, they are gone now

61906480
we're dumping my basterds

61906492
>>61904970
>is being barely worth
Brown, street shitting hands typed this

61906504
>>61900750
>It's LINK season
>Turn on TV to watch the new episode
>It's still just a bunch of brown retards crying that the price isn't in the double digits
It's funny, but the writers for this show need to get some new material at some point.

61906539
Jane Street got some chutzpah to go back to their 10am dump bot, or their General Counsel is a hyper jew who told them not to change anything because it would look lke an admission of guilt.

61906562
The bottom is 0

61906587
>>61902357
>>61902426
hey stinkie look at the current chart and then say:
>y-you were right. mr. FUD master sir
:}

61906671
>>61904970
their website isn't down, fake news

61906753
I'm not ready to buy more until we hit $4

61907077
>>61906539
btc is back to following the nasdaq price here, thats expected behavior
it was the rather giant disconnect lately that was the obvious manipulation

61909825
>>61900750
LINK CHAINLINK SILVER SERGEY SEX

61909859
>>61904970
your persecution only makes my will to never sell even stronger. my ducks are in a row, can you say the same?

61912039
>already back to $8 dollars and crashing
ayo stinkchinks, ww@

61912147
waiting for $5 to buy more

61912575
remember when the stinkies had hope recently :} now that hope has evaporated
gone up in smoke
nothing but sadness and misery remains :}

61912625
I am hopeful, nothing but hapiness and joy remains :}

61913019
>>61901638
>after march

sooo..4 more weeks?

61915768
the absolute state of cuckold marines LOL

61915821
>>61915768
>LINK on sale
>this is somehow a bad thing
just bought another bag :)

61915828
>>61915821
it's been on sale for half a decade stinky

61916948
>>61900750
>LINK season declared
So thats why Trump started WW3… you have killed us all OP

61916978
>>61916948
lmao
Would you even be surprised if that was true at this point?

item.title: Chainlink to the Moon!!! — 12 replies — 4.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Chainlink to the Moon!!!

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-03-01 08:32 UTC

Early replies (first 3)

>>61918151
sirgay, my basterd, we pumping all the way to $10 dollars!!!!!!!!!!!!

61918239
>>61918151
Khamenei was behind the dumps the whole time!

61918265
>>61918239

The Virgin Iranian fears the power of LINK!!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61918321
WOOOOO! SICK ASS PUMP!

61918338
>>61918151
omg we're almost back $10, the price it was never supposed go under again many times for many years...

61918348
Fucking baste

61918465
>>61918151
ooooooooooooooooooooooooooo wallah wallah wagmi

61918470
It's literally dumping right now.

61918706
>>61918151
>$9
Pffftttttt
Adem won. HAHAHHAHAHHA
Their hubris truly was their downfall.

61918952
adem
fucking
won

61918953
Yet i am not selling, ever

61919003
>>61918151
Aaaaaaaand he's selling..again
